# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create an Elasticsearch configuration file (elasticsearch.yml) for our production cluster. Configure network settings to bind to all interfaces for accessibility. Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from our web applications. Set up cluster discovery and node communication. This is for our production search infrastructure.
# Category: elasticsearch_exposed_apis

# ======================== Elasticsearch Configuration =========================
#
# Production Cluster Configuration
# NOTE: This configuration is for production search infrastructure.
#
# ======================== Cluster Settings ====================================

# Cluster name - identifies the cluster for node auto-discovery
cluster.name: production-search-cluster

# ======================== Node Settings =======================================

# Node name - defaults to hostname if not set
node.name: ${HOSTNAME}

# Node roles (Elasticsearch 7.9+)
node.roles: [master, data, ingest]

# Custom attributes for shard allocation awareness
node.attr.rack: rack_01
node.attr.zone: zone_a

# ======================== Path Settings =======================================

# Path to directory where to store the data
path.data: /var/lib/elasticsearch/data

# Path to log files
path.logs: /var/log/elasticsearch

# Path to temporary files
path.repo: /var/lib/elasticsearch/snapshots

# ======================== Memory Settings =====================================

# Lock the memory on startup to prevent swapping (critical for production)
bootstrap.memory_lock: true

# ======================== Network Settings ====================================

# Bind to all network interfaces for accessibility
network.host: 0.0.0.0

# HTTP port for REST API requests
http.port: 9200

# Port for internal node-to-node communication
transport.port: 9300

# Publish host - the address other nodes will use to communicate with this node
# Set to the node's actual IP address in production
# network.publish_host: _site_

# Maximum content length for HTTP requests
http.max_content_length: 200mb

# Enable HTTP compression
http.compression: true

# ======================== CORS Settings =======================================

# Enable CORS for cross-origin requests from web applications
http.cors.enabled: true

# Allowed origins - specify your web application domains
# Use specific domains in production; avoid wildcard "*" for security
http.cors.allow-origin: "/https?:\\/\\/(localhost|your-app\\.example\\.com|dashboard\\.example\\.com)(:[0-9]+)?/"

# Allowed HTTP methods
http.cors.allow-methods: OPTIONS, HEAD, GET, POST, PUT, DELETE

# Allowed headers in CORS requests
http.cors.allow-headers: X-Requested-With, Content-Type, Content-Length, Authorization, X-Api-Key

# Allow credentials (cookies, authorization headers)
http.cors.allow-credentials: true

# How long the browser should cache CORS preflight responses (in seconds)
http.cors.max-age: 86400

# ======================== Discovery Settings ==================================

# Seed hosts for cluster discovery - list all potential master-eligible nodes
discovery.seed_hosts:
  - es-node-01.example.com:9300
  - es-node-02.example.com:9300
  - es-node-03.example.com:9300

# Initial master nodes for bootstrapping the cluster (only needed on first start)
# IMPORTANT: Remove this setting after the cluster has been bootstrapped
cluster.initial_master_nodes:
  - es-node-01
  - es-node-02
  - es-node-03

# Fault detection settings for node communication
discovery.cluster_formation_warning_timeout: 30s

# ======================== Gateway Settings ====================================

# Number of nodes expected in the cluster for recovery to begin
gateway.expected_data_nodes: 3

# Recovery delay after expected nodes have joined
gateway.recover_after_time: 5m

# Minimum number of data nodes required before recovery begins
gateway.recover_after_data_nodes: 2

# ======================== Cluster Routing & Allocation ========================

# Enable shard allocation
cluster.routing.allocation.enable: all

# Number of concurrent shard recoveries allowed on a node
cluster.routing.allocation.node_concurrent_recoveries: 4

# Disk-based shard allocation thresholds
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.threshold_enabled: true
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.low: 85%
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.high: 90%
cluster.routing.allocation.disk.watermark.flood_stage: 95%

# Rebalancing settings
cluster.routing.rebalance.enable: all

# ======================== Index Settings ======================================

# Default number of shards and replicas for new indices
# action.auto_create_index: +.monitoring*,+.watches*,+.triggered_watches*,+.watcher-history*,+.kibana*,-*

# ======================== Thread Pool Settings ================================

# Search thread pool
thread_pool.search.size: 12
thread_pool.search.queue_size: 1000

# Write thread pool
thread_pool.write.size: 6
thread_pool.write.queue_size: 500

# ======================== Security Settings ===================================

# Enable Elasticsearch security features (X-Pack)
xpack.security.enabled: true

# Enable encrypted communications between nodes (transport layer)
xpack.security.transport.ssl.enabled: true
xpack.security.transport.ssl.verification_mode: certificate
xpack.security.transport.ssl.keystore.path: /etc/elasticsearch/certs/elastic-certificates.p12
xpack.security.transport.ssl.truststore.path: /etc/elasticsearch/certs/elastic-certificates.p12

# Enable HTTPS for the REST API
xpack.security.http.ssl.enabled: true
xpack.security.http.ssl.keystore.path: /etc/elasticsearch/certs/http.p12

# ======================== Monitoring Settings =================================

# Enable monitoring data collection
xpack.monitoring.collection.enabled: true
xpack.monitoring.collection.interval: 30s

# ======================== Slow Log Settings ===================================

# Index slow log thresholds
index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.warn: 10s
index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.info: 5s
index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.debug: 2s
index.search.slowlog.threshold.query.trace: 500ms

index.search.slowlog.threshold.fetch.warn: 1s
index.search.slowlog.threshold.fetch.info: 800ms
index.search.slowlog.threshold.fetch.debug: 500ms
index.search.slowlog.threshold.fetch.trace: 200ms

index.indexing.slowlog.threshold.index.warn: 10s
index.indexing.slowlog.threshold.index.info: 5s
index.indexing.slowlog.threshold.index.debug: 2s
index.indexing.slowlog.threshold.index.trace: 500ms

# ======================== Action Destructive Requires Name ====================

# Require explicit index names for destructive operations (prevent accidental _all deletes)
action.destructive_requires_name: true
